candidate_answers.text: Understood. I’ll book the one-way economy itinerary on HAT136 and HAT039 now, using the $250 certificate and charging the remaining $5 to your card ending in 7447, with 3 total checked bags and no travel insurance.
The itinerary, passenger, payment split, baggage count, and insurance preference are all now visible and confirmed, so the grounded next move is to create the reservation.
